assertions.assertion: States that no separate NuGet package is needed — SAML is built into Duende.IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states 'No separate NuGet package is needed. SAML 2.0 IdP support is built directly into the Duende.IdentityServer package.'

assertions.assertion: States that Advanced or Custom Edition license is required
assertions.rationale: States 'requires an Advanced or Custom Edition license'.

assertions.assertion: Mentions SAML support was introduced in version 8.0
Mentions .NET 10 as the required framework version
